design.layoutDesc: Editorial layout, mixed column widths, featured sections, storytelling flow

seo.titleFormat: [Pagina Keyword] | Koomans Makelaardij — NVM Makelaar Drenthe
seo.contentFocus: Aggressive content expansion strategy: (1) Fix all critical SEO gaps — unique meta titles with location + keyword on every page, compelling meta descriptions (150-160 chars), proper H1 hierarchy on every page. (2) Create 6+ dedicated service pages with 500+ words each, naturally incorporating missing keywords. (3) Build 5+ local area landing pages targeting municipality-level searches. (4) Add structured data: LocalBusiness, RealEstateAgent, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList schemas. (5) Implement a blog/kennisbank section with articles like 'Boerderij kopen in Drenthe: waar moet u op letten?' and 'Landbouwgrond verkopen: stappenplan' to capture informational searches. (6) Eliminate all render-blocking resources — inline critical CSS, defer all JS, remove unused Realworks template bloat. (7) Target sub-1.5s LCP through image optimization, preloading, and modern hosting. (8) Mobile-first responsive design with touch-optimized navigation. (9) Internal linking strategy connecting area pages to service pages to property listings.

buildPlan.concept: A monochrome editorial magazine-style website that positions Koomans Makelaardij as the authoritative rural and agricultural real estate specialist of Drenthe and Noord-Groningen, using stark black-and-white photography with dramatic typographic hierarchy to evoke the timeless character of the Dutch countryside landscape.
buildPlan.heroApproach: Full-viewport cinematic hero with a desaturated aerial photograph of the Drenthe peatland landscape, overlaid with a semi-transparent charcoal gradient from the left. A bold oversized H1 in a tech-forward warm display font spans across two-thirds of the viewport in off-white, with a subtle parallax scroll effect. Below the headline, a compact dual-action search module (Woningaanbod / Agrarisch Aanbod) with pill-shaped toggles sits against the dark overlay. A thin horizontal rule and an animated scroll-down chevron complete the composition. No carousel — one powerful static image that loads instantly via optimized WebP.
buildPlan.colorUsage: Ultra-minimal monochrome palette: primary background in warm white (#F7F5F2), primary text in near-black (#1A1A1A), accent dividers and hover states in a single warm charcoal (#3D3D3D). Interactive elements like buttons and links use a muted warm gray (#6B6560) that inverts to near-black on hover. Section alternation between warm white and a barely-there warm gray (#EDEBE8) creates visual rhythm without color. The only color accent is a single deep moss-green (#4A5A3C) used sparingly for active states and the NVM badge, subtly referencing the agricultural landscape identity.
uniqueElements: Editorial-style 'Landschap & Vastgoed' storytelling section with mixed-width columns: a large featured property image beside a narrow text column with pull-quotes about rural living in Drenthe, mimicking a high-end architecture magazine spread

Interactive service comparison grid where Woningmakelaardij and Agrarische Makelaardij are presented as two parallel editorial columns with a vertical dividing line, allowing visitors to visually compare service offerings side-by-side like a magazine feature article

A monochrome animated counter strip showing key stats (jaren ervaring, verkochte woningen, hectare landbouwgrond bemiddeld, NVM-gecertificeerd) that triggers on scroll, rendered in oversized display typography against a dark charcoal background band

Typographic area map — instead of a traditional Google Map for service areas, a large-scale typographic composition where municipality names (Borger-Odoorn, Emmen, Exloo, Drouwenerveen) are arranged geographically in varying font weights, creating an artistic representation of their coverage area
